title: youtube poop: Football is for Egg-Heads The Remake
description:
Danny: I wanted to do this but I never had time to start it. but now here it is a remake of the first poop I ever made. This is more like a Today version of the video because the old one was made on the old version of windows movie maker which had no effects at all. this one is 100 times better than the original video. . . in my opinion. the reason I made this was a little gift to all of my fans and suscribers I would like to thank you all if you guys didn't enjoy my videos I would never had got this far in makeing youtube poop.
